description.en: Check the cache for validity. Use this function if files in the cache may have changed on disk, and you require the updated version. If filename is omitted, it will check all the entries in the cache.

excerpt.es: Check the cache for validity. Use this function if files in the cache may have changed on disk, and you require the updated version. If filename is omitted, it will check all the entries in the cache.
excerpt.en: Check the cache for validity. Use this function if files in the cache may have changed on disk, and you require the updated version. If filename is omitted, it will check all the entries in the cache.

description.en: Clear the cache. Use this function if you no longer need lines from files previously read using getline().

excerpt.es: Clear the cache. Use this function if you no longer need lines from files previously read using getline().
excerpt.en: Clear the cache. Use this function if you no longer need lines from files previously read using getline().
